translations.en: a man who looks very amused--whether with his surroundings or himself is hard to say.
translations.zh: 一位看起來自得其樂之男子——究竟是對周遭感到有趣，還是對自己感到有趣，實難分辨。

translations.en: "Ah, welcome, $G! Come have a @drink with me!"
"Have you had your fortune told yet?"
"Some people think @Penumbra's a hoax. But she knows her stuff. You should bear with her - she can truly be of great assistance to you."
translations.zh: 「有些人以為@Penumbra（潘布）拉是個騙子。但她確有真本事。汝應耐心配合她——她確實能給汝莫大的幫助。」
「德里德拉斯。汝的名字又是什麼來著？」

translations.en: "Oh, yes, of course. Come, have a seat."
"Trying to discover all the subtleties of Frasier's @Folly is almost a career in itself!"
translations.zh: 「鑽研弗雷澤之@Folly（愚醇）的所有微妙之處，幾乎本身就是一份職業！」

translations.en: "Aye, this is the home of Frasier's @Folly!"
translations.zh: 「是的，此乃弗雷澤之@Folly（愚醇）的發源地！」

translations.en: "In all the towns of Britannia, you'll find no better brew."
translations.zh: 「縱觀不列顛尼亞諸城，無處能找到更佳的釀造。」

translations.en: "My drinking buddy! Let's drink a toast to him, wherever he is."
translations.zh: 「吾的飲酒伙伴！無論他身在何處，讓吾等舉杯致敬。」

translations.en: "She's a strange one, but she has the gift."
"Leaving already? And you're not even wobbling yet..."
translations.zh: 「這就要走？汝連走路都還沒搖搖晃晃呢……」

translations.en: "I'll drink to that," he says, suiting action to words.
translations.zh: 「為此乾杯，」他說道，言出必行地舉杯飲下。

translator_notes: 德里德拉斯是個終日在酒館喝酒的快活人，語氣隨性、詼諧。萬事皆可舉杯相慶。$Z 是玩家輸入的詞，保留不譯。
